# Sri B.G Reddy Dental Clinic

Official website: https://www.bgreddydentalclinic.com/

Sri B.G Reddy Dental Clinic is a dental clinic in Gandimaisamma, Hyderabad, Telangana 500043.

## Key information

- Clinic name: Sri B.G Reddy Dental Clinic
- Doctor: Dr. Rajashekar Reddy
- Address: BGR Arcade, 3-93-4/D, Gandi Maisamma X Rd, D.P. Pally Village, Gandi Maisamma, Hyderabad, Telangana 500043
- Phone: +91 98493 26242
- Services: dental checkups, braces and orthodontics, root canal treatment, crowns and bridges, extractions, implants, dentures, gum care, scaling, polishing and fillings

## Website sections

- Home: overview of clinic and treatments
- Services: treatment list
- Gallery: clinic showcase
- Reviews: patient feedback highlights
- Appointment: WhatsApp appointment request
- Owner login: private clinic dashboard for authorized users only

## Crawling guidance

Public clinic information is available on the home page. Private owner dashboard content requires authentication and should not be indexed.
